description: A client has requested a raw data export of their campaign performance from the last month.

nodes.task_description: Select the correct date range (last month) in the ad platform.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets the date range correctly.

nodes.task_description: Select all relevant performance columns to include in the export.

expected_outcome.value: Agent chooses the columns for spend, clicks, impressions, etc.

nodes.task_description: Export the data as a CSV file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully downloads the requested raw data.
